params.js: (function(){var lis=document.querySelectorAll('#user-repositories-list ul li');var repos=[];lis.forEach(function(li){var a=li.querySelector('h3 a, a[itemprop*=\"name\"]');if(!a)return;var name=(a.textContent||'').trim();var href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';var desc=(li.querySelector('p[itemprop=description], p')||{}).textContent||'';var lang=(li.querySelector('[itemprop=programmingLanguage]')||{}).textContent||'';var rt=li.querySelector('relative-time');var time=rt?(rt.getAttribute('datetime')||''):'';repos.push({name:name,href:href,description:desc.trim().slice(0,140),language:lang.trim(),updated:time});});window.__repos=repos;return {totalCount:repos.length, top5:repos.slice(0,5)}})()

(function(){var commits=[];var seen=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('a[href*=\"/commit/\"]').forEach(function(a){var href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';var m=href.match(/\/commit\/([0-9a-f]{7,40})/);if(!m)return;var sha=m[1].slice(0,7);if(seen.has(sha))return;seen.add(sha);var container=a.closest('li, article, div[data-testid], tr')||a.parentElement&&a.parentElement.parentElement;var msg=(a.textContent||'').trim();if(!msg||msg.length<3){var ml=container&&container.querySelector('a[href*=\"/commit/\"]');if(ml)msg=(ml.textContent||'').trim();}var t=container&&container.querySelector('relative-time, time');var time=t?(t.getAttribute('datetime')||''):'';var authorEl=container&&container.querySelector('a[data-hovercard-type=user], a[href^=\"/\"][href*=\"author\"]');var author=authorEl?(authorEl.textContent||'').trim():'';commits.push({sha:sha,message:msg.slice(0,160),author:author,time:time});});return {url:location.href, title:document.title, totalCommitAnchors:document.querySelectorAll('a[href*=\"/commit/\"]').length, uniqueCommits:commits.length, top10:commits.slice(0,10)}})()
